title: Difference between == and equals() in Java
content: Explain the difference between the == operator and the equals() method in Java. When should each be used?

title: Explain Java Collections Framework
content: Describe the Java Collections Framework. What are the main interfaces and their implementations?

content: Explain the concepts of method overloading and method overriding in Java with examples.

content: How does garbage collection work in Java? Explain the different types of garbage collectors.

title: What is Java?
content: Explain the key features of Java. Why is it called platform-independent and secure?

title: JDK, JRE, and JVM
content: Explain the role of JDK, JRE, and JVM in Java development and execution.

title: Program: check if a number is prime
content: Write a Java program to check whether a number is prime or not.

title: OOP concepts in Java
content: List and explain the four pillars of OOP: Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstraction.

title: Swap two numbers without third variable
content: Write a Java program to swap two numbers without using a third variable.

content: Explain the concept of interfaces in Java. How do they differ from abstract classes?

content: Explain checked vs unchecked exceptions with examples.

content: What is a thread? How do you create threads using Thread class and Runnable interface?

content: Explain Java Database Connectivity steps: Driver loading, Connection, Statement, ResultSet, Close.

content: What are the key differences between abstract classes and interfaces in Java?

content: Write a Java program to reverse a given string without using built-in functions.

content: Write a Java program to check whether a string or number is a palindrome.

content: Write a Java program to calculate factorial of a number using recursion.

content: Write a Java program to check whether a number is an Armstrong number.

content: Write a Java program to sort an array in ascending order.

content: Write a Java program to generate the Fibonacci series up to n terms.

content: Write a Java program to perform binary search on a sorted array.

content: Explain different types of comments used in Java with examples.

content: List all primitive data types in Java and give an example of each.

content: Write Java code to store and print 5 student names using an array.

title: Methods in Java
content: Write a Java program with a method that adds two numbers and returns the sum.

content: Write a Java program to demonstrate a parameterized constructor.

title: Inheritance
content: Write a Java program that demonstrates single inheritance using classes A and B.
